YouTube収益は全てご自身のもの！
安定的な収入を得ながら動画クリエイターになる！
新宿区 テレワーク・在宅OK

仕事内容：
□動画作成
□編集補助
□動画企画立案
□SEとして弊社請負の案件での稼働、もしくは弊社請負の販売職案件での稼働
□YouTuberとしての１人立ちを諦めることがあっても、弊社内で職位を上げていったり、YouTuber達のサポート側・裏方に回ることも可能です。

現役クリエイターの指導と安定した収入の補償の下、超高収入YouTubeクリエイターを一緒に目指しましょう！

こんな人におすすめ

(1)最新のyouTuberスキルを学びたい方
トレンドの変化の早いyouTube業界において、業界を牽引する現役プロのクリエイターから最新の教育水準を維持したカリキュラムを学べます。

(2)フリーランスや副業で稼ぎたい方
YouTuberとしての配信を行うことで自分の得意なことや好きなことを活用した収益化を可能とし、最終的にはフリーランスでの活動ができます。

(3)収入を得ながら、リスクの無い形で人生の大成功にチャレンジしたい方
通常業務の中で一般会社員としての収入は得られるので、生活に不安を抱く事はありません。

YouTuberとしてのチャレンジは収入になるまで比較的長い期間を要することが多く、人生設計としてはある種ギャンブル的なものになってしまいますが、当社で働きながら＆アドバイスを受けながらYouTube投稿をする事で、リスクなく早期に収益化＆１本立ちを目指せます。

応募資格
未経験者、既卒・第二新卒、大歓迎！

★学歴は一切問いません！
●副業・Wワークも可能です！

(1)未経験歓迎！！
動画編集未経験の方でも、今までは独学でやっていたが改めて１から動画編集技術を学びなおしたい方も、
安心の教育環境が整っています。

(2)現役クリエイター講師！
現役クリエイター＆スタッフによる直接指導。最新スキルが学べるだけでなく、仕事につながる業界ネットワークのきっかけにも。

(3)代表自らもYouTube投稿者！
当社代表もYouTube投稿者として活動中であり、
代表個人としても動画投稿者として一緒に成長していける方と切磋琢磨したい気持ちを持っています。

(4)安心の社会的地位・収入の補償
YouTuberとしての１人立ちを諦めることがあっても、弊社内で職位を上げていくことに方向転換することも可能です。

(5)YouTube収益は全てご自身のもの！
巷にあるYouTube事務所と違い、YouTube広告収益においては全てご自身のもの、会社に収めていただく必要は一切ありません。

content:
【YouTube再審査→🈴合格なるか！？】
1/28に収益化が停止してから3ヶ月、

最初はGoogleにブチギレ😤💢、
「ファァアああああああっっっっく！」

散々ネタをパクってきてたのに
収益化停止していない競合を見て
気が狂いそう😡😱になり、
「なんでやねえええええええん！！！」

地獄のような期間を過ごしましたが😇
この度、再審査を送りました。

（結果はまだです...📝）

▼詳細
①公開動画：30本ほど
②非公開や限定公開の動画：なし
　→公開中の動画30本以外は全部削除
③収益化停止後に作った動画：４本
　・人間ナレーション
　・見せ方工夫しエフェクト、SE最大活用
　・サムネの型も変更
④チャンネル全体の変更点：
　・1000本以上の動画を削除
　・機械音声の動画は削除
　・サムネのテンプレ感が強い企画は、
　　人間ナレーションであっても削除
　　→伸びる企画の型を擦っていた時期が
　　　だいぶ長かったので、
　　　その時期の動画はほぼ削除。
　・スライドショーだけの動画は削除
　　→そこにSEやエフェクトなど映像演出の
　　　工夫が入っている動画は残し

＊）その他
・全削除の前に残したい300本は
　Google Takeoutでダウンロード済。
・その300本を使って、メンバーシップに
　役立てられないかを思案中

再審査をするにあたって
収益化停止前の動画を
「全削除」する選択肢も
ありましたが、

でも過去の動画を振り返って
「いやでも元々、
　人間ナレーションだったし、
　編集も丁寧にやってたし、
　これは流石に残しててもよくないか？」
という動画を選別して残しています。

▼絶望の3ヶ月を経て
メインchの収益化剥奪は大きな大きな
痛手でしたが、それによりサブCHを
大きく育てられたことは財産です。

ディレクターさんに協力をお願いして、
Dアカウントでの新CH立上げたことも
大きな大きな財産です。

とはいえメインCHは
人生初の非属人チャンネルでもあり、
5年弱運営してきて、
愛着があり、専門知識もあり、
視聴者理解がとことん深く、
溢れんばかりの情熱があるので、
復活してくれることを祈ります🙏

再審査通りますように、アーメン🙏

title:
なんでひろゆきさんのモノマネを？なんで面白くもないのにそこそこ伸びたんですか？とよく聞かれるのでここに書かせてください。
おいらがひろゆきさんのモノマネを始めたのはかれこれ8年前。当時はひろゆきさんはYouTubeのチャンネル登録が6万人ぐらいだったでしょうか。ひろゆき切り抜きというものもなく、当時サラリーマンだった僕は月々お小遣い20000円という中で塞がってました。

20000円だと昼飯を仕
content:
なんでひろゆきさんのモノマネを？なんで面白くもないのにそこそこ伸びたんですか？とよく聞かれるのでここに書かせてください。
おいらがひろゆきさんのモノマネを始めたのはかれこれ8年前。当時はひろゆきさんはYouTubeのチャンネル登録が6万人ぐらいだったでしょうか。ひろゆき切り抜きというものもなく、当時サラリーマンだった僕は月々お小遣い20000円という中で塞がってました。

20000円だと昼飯を仕事の時に買ってると残り10000円です。飲み会なんて行けばもう娯楽に使えるものなんてないんです。人生詰んだ、詰んでる…そんな感じでした。これは副業でなんとかするしかないと意気込み、ネットで検索しました。せどり…ブログ…アフリエイトなど出てきて実はブログで稼ごうと記事を書いたりもしました。当たり前ですが全然アクセスも獲得できず一銭にもなりません。

呆然として、死んだように電車で橋下徹さんのMBSの記者論破動画を見てストレス解消してたんです。そしてたらおすすめでひろゆきさんのあなたの感想ですよね？や伝説の写像動画が出てきて…

なんだこの人…かっけー

となるのです。僕はひろゆきさんのこと知りませんでした。若い頃、深夜まで慌ただしく飲食店でバイトしてたもんですからニコニコ動画や2ちゃんねるってものとは全然縁がなくほぼ見たこともなかったため、ひろゆきさんを知らなかった。

知らないからこそ、フラットにひろゆきさんを見た時に「この人すげーな…なんでこんな説得力あるようにわかりやすく話ができるんだろう」と思ったんです。

そしてそこから漁るように動画を見始めます。そして幼馴染と電話をしてる時に「俺、最近ひろゆきさん見ててさ…」とモノマネを披露したんです。そしたら

「似てるwwww」って笑ってくれて

正直、僕はモノマネは得意かと言うと学生時代クラスの先生や学校の先輩のモノマネをして笑いをとってた友だちって1人は居たと思うんです。そんなレベルです

ただその幼馴染を笑わせたことにより、勘違いした僕はなぜかYouTubeにアップをしてみようと思い付きます笑

ほぼノー編集でアップしてみたところ100回再生されました。

こんなもんか…そりゃそうだよな。。2、3個あげたところ100再生するものの、当時の僕はとにかく1000円でも2000円でも稼ぎたかったわけですから

「なんだこれ…無理だ。。」

と、投稿を諦めます。そして一年が経ちました。一年が経つ中でたまーにコメントが付いてたんです

「ひろゆきのモノマネは需要なくて草」
「クソ似てるwwwww」
「ニッチww」
「俺得」

嬉しくて見てたんです。
で、きっかけは思い出せないんですが一年経って何故か

もう一回投稿してみようと思ったんです。で、よくみると当時パソコン持ってなかったんですがスマホのYouTube画面に配信ボタンがあったんです。

ん？配信できんの？？押してみたら繋がって10人ぐらいが集まったんです笑
そしてその10人にモノマネを披露する。その10人が反応してくれる。気付けば仕事して家に帰ってからの楽しみになってました。毎晩、仕事から終わったら1、2時間配信するんです。それを繰り返してたらYouTubeチャンネル登録1000人を達成できました。

今なんてひろゆきさんのモノマネする人はたくさんいると思います。ただ当時は僕だけだったんです。そのモノマネが面白いとか似てるとかじゃなくて、その視点うけるwみたいな方が見てくれてた

要はゼロイチ、先行者利益だったんです。あとは頭のおかしい「ひろゆかない」というキャッチーな名前のおかげもあったかもしれません。

そしてAbemaPrimeというネット番組に呼ばれます。ひろゆきさんにモノマネをぶつけたらどうなるんだろう？というこで企画が立ったのだと思います。当時ひろゆきさんのモノマネなんてしてるのは僕だったわけです。

完全に見た目もおかしいしつまらないけど僕しかないんじゃあ僕を呼ぶしかないですよね笑

ただAbemaPrimeに出ただけでは人生は変わりませんでしたが笑

何が言いたいかというと僕はひろゆきさんをフラットな目で見た時に「え？なんでこの人有名じゃないの？」と驚いたということ。
でも界隈じゃあ有名だったけど、僕みたいな一般層からはまだ有名じゃなかった。
そして、投資家みたいにひろゆきさんはこれから伸びるだろうからモノマネしてみようというやらしい感じではなく、ただ好きになり熱中してしまった。そして気がついたらひろゆきさんや、ひろゆきさんの周りの人と仲良くなっていたんです。

整理すると後付けにはなりますが

•好きな人（もの）を見つけて熱中して研究してアウトプットしたら仲間ができた

•ひろゆきさんがYouTube６万人から現在１６０万人という伸びに波乗りさせてもらった

•誰もライバルがいなかった（先行者利益）

モノマネというも事態はぶっちゃけ参入障壁がめちゃくちゃ低いですので僕は運が良かっただけです

content:
I spent years of my life on YouTube.  
150K+ subscribers.  

And now I may never be able to earn from my work and the skills I built over all those years for YouTube ever again.  

I was denied YPP because of a connection to an old channel with 17K subscribers. On that channel, there was a Spider-Man vs Shark series, and years later they suddenly decided it was “dangerous content involving minors” 

So I asked support:  

“I deleted the channel. If I wait 90 days, will monetization return on my main channel?”  

The response I got was just a generic copy-paste with no real answer.  

Waited 90 days.  
Applied again.  

Now YouTube says:  
“First restore your YPP status on the deleted channel.”  

The deleted channel.  

And when I ask them to restore the deleted channel, they say it’s impossible.  

So basically:  
the only way to restore YPP is through something that cannot be restored.  

Years of work, sleepless nights, growing the channel — all wiped away by bots and automated support responses.  

But YouTube still runs ads on my videos.  
The only difference is that now I don’t get paid for them.  

I’m not even going to talk about my mental state because of all this. I hid most of my videos and only left the popular ones for viewers.  

(I support you in response 🤝)

@TeamYouTube @YouTubeCreators @YouTube

content:
rape
Systemic Sabotage — A Cross-Tradition and Trauma-Biology Investigation
🐉 KENNEDY · GRIMALDI · DAIN
Mar 26, 2026
✦ ✦ ✦

THE MECHANISM IS OLDER THAN WRITING.

Enlil rapes Ninlil on the riverbank. He is banished to the underworld. She follows. Three gods are conceived from three subsequent rapes. The myth encodes rape as a mechanism for producing and controlling lineage. Ninlil’s sovereignty is not restored. It is replaced.

The Archons attempt to rape Eve. She escapes into the tree, leaving a shadow. They violate the shadow. The myth says: rape attempts to capture the essence, the transmission, the soul — and fails. The shadow is what can be taken. The light escapes.

Set attempts to sexually dominate Horus. Horus catches Set’s semen in his hand and shows it to Isis. Isis cuts off the contaminated hand, throws it in the river, makes him a new one, and uses Set’s own semen against him. The myth encodes: rape is a dominance mechanism — and there is a counter-technology. The violated does not remain violated. The violation can be reversed and weaponised against the violator.

Indra rapes Ahalya by disguising himself as her husband. She is cursed to become invisible stone for centuries. The myth encodes: the raped woman becomes invisible. Her testimony is erased. Her body becomes the site of the crime, not the evidence of it.

Persephone is abducted and raped by Hades. The earth stops producing. Her mother Demeter refuses to function. The compromise — half the year below, half above — produces the seasons. The myth encodes: rape has civilisational consequences. The mother’s response is refusal. The daughter’s return is partial.

The Sabine women are abducted and raped by the founders of Rome. They eventually broker peace between their fathers and their rapists. The myth installs rape as the origin story of civilisation. The raped woman becomes the bridge. Her trauma becomes the foundation.

Cassandra is granted prophecy by Apollo. She refuses him. He curses her so that no one will believe her true predictions. The myth encodes: the woman who knows things will not be believed. Her knowledge is contingent on her submission. When she refuses, her truth becomes unbelievable.

Medusa is raped by Poseidon in Athena’s temple. Athena punishes Medusa with monstrousness. The myth encodes: the raped woman is punished twice — by the god who violated her, by the goddess who should have protected her. Her gaze becomes weapon. But she is already dead.

Lilith refuses to lie beneath Adam and is cast out. She is replaced by Eve, made from Adam’s rib — taken from inside him, not created independently. The myth encodes: the equal woman is replaced by the derivative woman. The substitution is the mechanism.

Clytemnestra kills Agamemnon for sacrificing their daughter Iphigenia. She is killed by her own son Orestes. Orestes is acquitted by Athena’s court — which explicitly sidelines the Furies, the ancient goddesses of maternal vengeance. The myth encodes: matrilineal justice is replaced by patriarchal law. The mother’s vengeance is criminalised. The son’s vengeance is sanctified.

The Cathar Perfectae walk into the flames at Montségur in 1244, singing hymns. The Inquisition targeted women holding spiritual authority. The Malleus Maleficarum links female healing knowledge to sexual congress with the devil. The trials involve detailed sexual interrogation. The torture includes examination of the body.

The mechanism is consistent across millennia: the woman who knows things is targeted. Her knowledge is sexualised. Her body is violated. Her testimony is destroyed. Her replacement is installed.

✦

THE NUMBERS.

Germany, 1945: 2 million women raped by Soviet forces. Documented. Not disputed.

Nanjing, 1937–38: 20,000–80,000 women raped. Documented at the Tokyo War Crimes Tribunal. Military policy.

Bangladesh, 1971: 200,000–400,000 women raped. Pakistani military commanders explicitly ordered it as a policy of ethnic destruction.

Bosnia, 1992–95: 20,000–50,000 women systematically raped in camps established for this purpose. The International Criminal Tribunal prosecuted rape as a crime against humanity and as genocide for the first time.

Rwanda, 1994: 250,000–500,000 women raped. Used as a deliberate tool of ethnic destruction — to impregnate Tutsi women with Hutu children, to destroy community cohesion, to spread HIV as a weapon.

Democratic Republic of Congo, ongoing: the rape capital of the world. The correlation with coltan, gold, and diamond extraction tells us: rape is infrastructure. It is the technology that makes extraction possible.

The comfort women system: 200,000 women enslaved by Imperial Japan. State policy. Documented.

The Thailand R&R program: 700,000 US servicemen, 1962–1976. Sex industry from 20,000 to 400,000. The Brodeur et al. 2018 peer-reviewed study: the geographic ghost of the US bases still visible in the distribution of the sex industry in 2026.

Mao’s Cultural Revolution: documented sexual violence as a tool of ideological purification. Stalin’s purges: documented systematic rape in the Soviet prison camp system as a tool of political terror. The Yazidi genocide: 500 women abducted and sexually enslaved by ISIS, under a theological manual justifying it as religiously sanctioned.

FGM: 200 million women. The WHO documents it as a human rights violation. The clitoral glans: 8,000–10,000 nerve endings removed. The body violated without consent. The pleasure permanently disabled.

Forced sterilisation: Sweden 1934–1976, North Carolina 7,700+ women, Norway 40,000, Denmark 6,000. One girl sterilised because she couldn’t read. She needed glasses.

Across documented history, the pattern is consistent: rape is used in war, occupation, revolution, religious purification, ethnic cleansing, and class struggle. It crosses every ideology. It is deployed by empires and liberation movements, by states and non-state actors, by left and right and centre.

Rape is not about sex. It is not about desire. It is not about power in the psychological sense.

It is administrative violence enacted through the body.

✦

THE HARDWARE.

The vagus nerve: 80% of its fibres are afferent — body to brain. It carries safety signals. Rape disrupts vagal tone. The survivor’s nervous system cannot distinguish past from present. The threat is always now.

The oxytocin system: the bonding hormone. Rape inverts it. Intimacy triggers the threat response. This is a neurochemical mechanism, not a psychological one. The body cannot tell the lover from the rapist.

The HPA axis: designed for acute threat. Rape locks it in the on position. Cortisol floods. Sleep breaks. Digestion stops. The immune system collapses. The body becomes the battleground of a war that never ends.

The fascia: stores trauma in tissue. The memory is not in the mind. It is in the matrix. Levine, van der Kolk, somatic experiencing: the matrix holds it. The matrix can release it.

Memory fragmentation: rape produces non-linear, fragmented, intrusive memory. The neuroscience documents: this is not a bug. It is a feature of the mechanism. The fragmentation makes the testimony unbelievable to a legal system designed for linear narrative. The law has the neuroscience exactly backwards.

Epigenetic transmission: trauma transmits through the maternal line. The grandmother’s violation appears in the granddaughter’s biology. The receiver is broken across generations.

Circumcision: the removal of 20,000 Meissner’s corpuscles. Sorrells et al. document 75% of genital sensitivity removed at birth, without consent. The male child’s antenna severed before he knows he had one.

Design a mechanism to maximally disrupt the human organism’s capacity for safety, bonding, presence, memory, and testimony.

The rape mechanism matches the specification. Precisely. Exactly. By design.

✦

THE PIPELINE.

Aristotle: “The female is as it were a deformed male.”

Aquinas: women are “defective and misbegotten.”

Schopenhauer: “Woman was God’s second mistake.”

Nietzsche: “Thou goest to women? Do not forget thy whip.”

Evola: women’s liberation is the fall of the West.

Dugin: “Female emancipation is rebellion against the divine, natural order — a direct attack on the state.”

And then the Telegram channels.

“Femoid scum.”

“I fucking hate women.”

“Women have a vagina and therefore must receive man on his will.”

“Millions of them are going to get killed — don’t lift a fucking finger to stop it.”

“That’s why Thailand exists, sir.”

“Women speak only when spoken to.”

“My solution is to subjugate single mums to the military and make them a 2nd wife to a soldier in the army.”

These are not thugs. These are the academic generation. Rhodes scholars. The ones who will inherit institutions. They cite Schopenhauer. They invoke Dugin. They are the philosophical inheritors of Aristotle, and they are planning the next round.

The same men who invoke the 2 million German women raped in 1945 as a historical atrocity are the men in those Telegram channels exhorting sexual jihad. The past atrocity is weaponised to justify the future atrocity. The victim becomes the justification. The wound becomes the weapon.

✦

THE NEW PANTHEON.

Place them next to each other. No commentary required. The texts speak.

“He knew her not.” (Genesis 4:1 — first sexual euphemism in the Hebrew Bible, consent unmarked.)

“Women have a vagina and therefore must receive man on his will.”

“A wife, a son, and a slave have no property; the wealth they earn belongs to him to whom they belong.” (Manusmriti, c. 200 BCE)

“Women need to obey and not think for themselves.”

“Women speak only when spoken to.”

“Kill them all. God will know His own.” (Papal legate at Béziers, 1209)

“Females en masse have become scum. They will lose everything. Millions of them are going to get killed — don’t lift a fucking finger to stop it.”

“All witchcraft comes from carnal lust, which is in women insatiable.” (Malleus Maleficarum, 1487)

“A woman is evil and poisonous and therefore MUST be controlled and kept unto servility by man.”

“The WOMAN is the devil in disguise.”

“The female is as it were a deformed male.” (Aristotle, c. 350 BCE)

“Men are better than women at everything virtuous.”

“Femoid scum.”

“Wives easily adjust to the conquerors, that’s why all the men are slain, the wives just yield to their new masters. It’s genetic, it’s resources, it’s whores breeding leading to more whores.”

(Sabine women, 753 BCE. Telegram channel, 2024 CE.)

What is the distance between these texts?

Three thousand years. A change of register. The underlying assumption — that the woman is there to receive, to yield, to be controlled, to be silenced — has not changed.

The contempt has not changed.

The mechanism has not changed.

The plan has not changed.

✦

WHAT SURVIVES.

The library at Alexandria burned. The Cathar texts burned. The Mayan codices burned. The knowledge survived. It went into the bodies of the people who carried it. Into the stone at Wat Pho. Into the prayers said before every healing session. Into the women who carried the medicine in their bodies when the committee told them there was nothing there.

The Wat Pho Principle: King Rama I inscribed medical knowledge in stone at a public temple in 1820. Cannot be burned. Cannot be paywalled. Cannot be owned. This investigation — these questions, these essays, this library — is the same principle applied to the rape mechanism. The mechanism is named. The mechanism is documented. It is placed where it cannot be burned.

Collective testimony: being believed changes the biology. The vagus tone restores. The oxytocin inversion reverses. The fascia releases. The body comes home.

The Riak Khwan: the body that has been violated loses its khwan. The soul departs the container that is no longer safe. Soul retrieval for the body that cannot be inhabited. What would a contemporary Riak Khwan look like? It would look like the survivor being believed. It would look like the mechanism being named. It would look like the library being built.

The demographic fact: women outlive men in every country on earth. In every war, in every famine, in every epidemic, women survive at higher rates than men. Survival itself is a form of immune response.

The men in those Telegram channels were groomed. Not by feminists — by a three-thousand-year philosophical pipeline from Aristotle through Schopenhauer through Dugin. They are not the origin of the mechanism. They are its latest deployment. You fight the pipeline. You name the pipeline. You document the pipeline. You put it in the library where everyone can see it. You cut off the supply of justification. You starve the mechanism of the one thing it needs to keep running: the story that it is natural, inevitable, justified.

✦

THE SYNTHESIS.

What rape takes: safety, testimony, lineage integrity, embodied sovereignty, collective memory.

What rape installs: shame, fragmentation, doubt, subjection, institutional mediation.

The oldest counter-technology is the woman who speaks.

The traditions knew this. They encoded it in every myth of survival. The Archons reach for Eve — she escapes into the tree. Set assaults Horus — Isis catches the semen and reverses the violation. The Perfectae walk into the flames singing. Cassandra speaks, and speaks, and speaks, even though no one believes her. She never stops.

The modern science confirms it: speaking changes the biology. Being believed changes the biology. Collective testimony changes the biology. The library changes the biology. The transmission that continues despite the sabotage is not a metaphor. It is a biological event.

The women are still here.

After everything documented in this investigation — the myths, the wars, the genocides, the comfort women, the R&R program, the forced sterilisation, the FGM, the Telegram channels planning the next round — the women are still here.

Still speaking. Still building the library. Still naming the mechanism. Still transmitting the signal. Still surviving.

The line carries. The library stands. The women are still here.

content:
Top 10 Paying Social Media Apps in 2025
(+ their estimated global users)

1️⃣ Facebook – ~3.07B users

Facebook is still the highest-paying platform in 2025. Between in-stream ads, Reels bonuses, and brand deals, creators have huge earning opportunities. With over 3 billion users, your content can reach almost every country.

2️⃣ YouTube – ~2.54B users

YouTube remains the king of long-form money. Ad revenue, Shorts Fund, memberships, and sponsorships make it one of the most profitable apps for creators. Its 2.5B+ users keep videos evergreen.

3️⃣ Instagram – ~2.3B users

Instagram pays creators through Reels, bonuses, affiliate tools, and partnerships. With over 2.3B users, it's one of the best places for visual storytelling, lifestyle content, and brand collabs.

4️⃣ WhatsApp – ~3.0B users

WhatsApp isn’t a traditional creator app, but its 3B users make it powerful for business owners, community monetization, channels, and direct sales. Perfect for creators building loyal audiences.

5️⃣ TikTok – ~1.9B users

TikTok is the short-form money machine. With ads, TikTok Pulse, creator rewards, and brand deals, creators can scale fast. Its 1.9B users drive viral moments that turn into real earnings.

6️⃣ Snapchat – ~900M users

Snapchat continues to pay creators through Spotlight. With 800–900M users, it's a strong platform for quick, fun content—and the payouts can surprise you.

7️⃣ Telegram – ~900M users

Telegram gives creators money through channels, paid content, premium subscriptions, and communities. With almost 900M users, it’s a quiet but powerful monetization hub.

8️⃣ WeChat – ~1.4B users

WeChat dominates China with 1.4B users. Creators earn through mini-apps, shops, and content monetization inside the ecosystem. Huge for business and digital sales.

9️⃣ Messenger – ~950M users

Messenger’s 950M users make it useful for creators selling digital products, running chat-based businesses, and earning through Meta tools connected to Facebook.

🔟 Douyin – ~750M users

Douyin (TikTok China) pays some of the highest creator rewards in the world. With 750M users, it’s a massive market for short-form video and e-commerce.

content:
This is my entry for the @GoDark video contest. To be honest, I’m not a professional video content creator. After discovering this contest, I spent almost a week researching on YouTube to learn how everything works and what I needed to do.

After a full week of continuous learning and practice, I was finally able to create this video. It took me more than 19 hours to complete, especially since I’m new to this field. However, through this contest, I gained a valuable skill ❤️

Now, let’s have a discussion about Go Dark together.

First of all, what is @GoDark?

GoDarkDex is basically a DEX (Decentralized Exchange).

That means you can trade directly using your own wallet no middleman involved.

Your funds, transactions, and trading positions remain completely private. No one can see them not even the platform itself.

In short, your privacy stays fully in your own hands.

@GoDark is crypto’s first dark pool DEX.

GoDark is a type of DEX (Decentralized Exchange) that uses a “dark pool” system.

What does dark pool mean?
In this system, trades are not publicly visible. That means who is buying or selling, and how much, remains hidden just as I mentioned earlier.

Now let’s understand Off-chain Matching and On-chain Settlement.

Off-chain Matching is very important.
Buy and sell orders are matched outside the blockchain first, which makes the process fast and keeps it private.

Now, about On-chain Settlement:
Once the orders are matched off-chain, the final transaction is completed on the blockchain. This ensures security and trust.

In simple terms:
The deal is fixed privately behind the scenes, and then it is officially confirmed on the blockchain.

Now let’s understand No Front Running.

Front running means someone sees your order in advance and places their own trade before yours to make a profit unfairly. But here, that is not possible.

Because orders are not visible, no bots, public users, or whales can see or track the trades.

So, the system prevents front running by keeping all orders hidden.

Your counterparty doesn’t even know you exist…

The person you are trading with won’t know who you are. It’s fully anonymous trading with maximum level privacy.

Now many of you might be thinking, Okay, I understand everything but how do I actually use it?

Don’t worry, I’ve got you covered. I’ll explain that as well.

✅ How It Works

🔹 1. Wallet Connect

First, you need to create a non custodial Solana wallet.

A non custodial wallet means:
You have full control of your wallet.
No one not even the platform can access your funds.

This wallet is secured with a Dynamic security system.

Simply put:
You connect your own wallet, and the control stays entirely in your hands.

🔹 2. Select

Next, you choose the tokens you want to trade.

The aggregator system then works in the background.

It finds the best prices from multiple sources.

Simply put:
You pick your tokens, and the system brings you the best available rate.

🔹 3. Trade

Once everything is ready, you confirm the transaction.

The trade is then executed instantly.

It completes within a few seconds.

Simply put:
As soon as you confirm, your trade is executed quickly and completed.

content:
📍📍New updat on X monitization📍📍

X has changed how impressions from verified users factor into creator payouts under the Ads Revenue Sharing (also called Creator Revenue Sharing) program.

In January 2026, X updated the monetization model significantly. Previously (in late 2024 and into early 2025), payouts emphasized engagement from verified/Premium users (likes, replies, reposts, etc.) and broader impressions, with some ad-revenue elements.

The key change, announced by @XCreators around January 16-17, 2026:

- Revenue sharing payouts are now based primarily (or solely) on "Verified Home Timeline impressions".
- This means earnings are driven by real views from Premium (verified) users who see your posts directly in their Home feed (For You or Following timelines).
- Impressions from other sources  lsuch as replies, notifications, search results, profile views, or external links no longer count (or count much less) toward payouts.
- Views from higher-tier Premium users (e.g., Premium+) are weighted more heavily.
- The platform also more than doubled the revenue sharing pool (funded by Premium subscriptions), leading to reports of many creators seeing 2x–3x higher payouts in early 2026 cycles, even with similar or flat total impressions, as the focus shifted to higher-quality, "resonating" content.

This shift aims to:
- Reward authentic, engaging content that consistently appears in timelines and sparks discussion.
- Reduce gaming/farming (e.g., reply spam, bot-driven views, or low-quality engagement).
- Combat inauthentic activity and prioritize genuine Premium user exposure.

Official X Help Center confirms: Earnings are influenced by Verified Home Timeline impressions from verified users in the Home timeline, which carry the main weight in calculations.

Other eligibility basics remain (active Premium subscription, 5M organic impressions in last 3 months though now weighted toward verified ones 500 verified followers, etc.), with payouts every two weeks (minimum $30 in some updates).

Many creators on X have noted this in discussions: High total impressions don't guarantee earnings if they're not from verified Home timeline views, and building a strong verified audience + algorithm-friendly content is now crucial.

For the most up-to-date details, check the X Help Center page on Creator Revenue Sharing or announcements from @XCreators.
